buffer_growth_engineer.title: Senior Growth Engineer
buffer_growth_engineer.summary: Product-minded engineer with 5+ years building production software across mobile, frontend, and API-connected systems in healthcare, logistics, and digital product environments. Strong experience with React, React Native, JavaScript, TypeScript, REST APIs, Firebase, and shipping reliable user-facing features. Comfortable owning delivery end to end, improving product quality through iteration and debugging, and working in remote, asynchronous teams where clarity and execution matter.

bullets: Built and maintained production applications and API-connected workflows for operational teams, with focus on reliability and user experience.
Improved software quality through debugging, structured testing, and iterative product delivery.

Improved app load speed by 35% through front-end optimization and performance-focused refinement.
Partnered with backend teams to deliver API-connected features and improve the product experience end to end.
